The rolling Mann-Kendall test indicates significant increasing trends in the early phases of the simulation, with a shift to no significant trend in the middle phases, and a slight decreasing trend towards the end.  After time step 725, the percentage of green patches begins to decline. This decline indicates a significant reduction in the availability of grass, which could be due to increased grazing pressure or environmental changes affecting grass regrowth.
